# LocalRise India

> LocalRise is an India-focused digital studio helping local businesses get online, get found and get more customers.

LocalRise provides professional websites, Google Business Profile setup, WhatsApp Business integration, ecommerce development, branding and business automation for small and local businesses across India.

## Primary pages

- [LocalRise India](https://localrise.in/): Company overview, packages and services.
- [Why LocalRise](https://localrise.in/why-us/): How LocalRise works and what makes the company different.
- [Website Design](https://localrise.in/services/websites/): Website design and development for small businesses.
- [Google Business Profile](https://localrise.in/services/google/): Google Business Profile setup and optimization.
- [WhatsApp Business Setup](https://localrise.in/services/whatsapp/): WhatsApp Business configuration and integration.
- [Ecommerce Websites](https://localrise.in/services/store/): Online-store development for small businesses.
- [Logo and Branding](https://localrise.in/services/logo/): Logo and brand identity services.
- [Design Concepts](https://localrise.in/concepts/): Fictional demonstration website concepts across different industries.

## Business information

- Website: https://localrise.in/
- Service area: India
- Email: help@localrise.in
